zh.lifeSummary: Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry是Teige MacCarthy 6th Lord of Muskerry和Catherine O'Brian的兒子，於1415年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克。他與Lady Mary Fitzmaurice在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1494年在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克科克布拉尼享年79歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克吉爾可亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry是Teige MacCarthy 6th Lord of Muskerry和Catherine O'Brian的儿子，于1415年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克。他与Lady Mary Fitzmaurice在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1494年在爱尔兰庫迪 科克科克布拉尼享年79岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 科克吉爾可亞。

nameMeanings.name: MacCarthy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McCarthy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Liam, Cormac, Niall, Aileen, Brigid, Conor, Declan, Dermod, Dermot, Finbar.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cárthaigh ‘son of Cárthach’, a personal name meaning ‘loving’. This was the name of a ruling family in Munster. In Ireland major branches were distinguished by the following epithets: mór ‘great’ in Kerry, riabhach ‘brindled’ in Carbery, west Cork.

nameMeanings.name: Cormac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional Irish name, of uncertain origin. It has been a very popular name in Ireland from the earliest times, and in modern times has been taken up in the wider English-speaking world .

nameMeanings.name: Laidir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Manfred.

variants.name: Leidig
meanings: from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed with the first element liut ‘people, tribe’.

nickname for a disagreeable, cantankerous person, from Middle High German leidic ‘disagreeable, tiresome’ or from līdec ‘suffering, patient’ for a person with these qualities. Compare Leidigh , Leidy , Leyda , Leydig , Lyda 1, Lyday , and Lydick .

en.lifeSummary: Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry was born in 1415, in Cork, County Cork, Ireland as the son of Teige MacCarthy 6th Lord of Muskerry and Catherine O'Brian. He married Lady Mary Fitzmaurice in Europe. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1494, in Blarney, Cork, County Cork, Ireland, at the age of 79, and was buried in Kilcrea, County Cork, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry est né en 1415, à Cork, County Cork, Irlande, fils de Teige MacCarthy 6th Lord of Muskerry et Catherine O'Brian. Il a épousé Lady Mary Fitzmaurice à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1494, à Blarney, Cork, County Cork, Irlande, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Kilcrea, County Cork, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry wurde 1415 in Cork, County Cork, Irland, als Sohn von Teige MacCarthy 6th Lord of Muskerry und Catherine O'Brian geboren. Er hat in Europa Lady Mary Fitzmaurice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1494 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Blarney, Cork, County Cork, Irland und wurde in Kilcrea, County Cork, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry è nato il nel 1415 nel Cork, County Cork, Irlanda come figlio di Teige MacCarthy 6th Lord of Muskerry e Catherine O'Brian. Lui sposato Lady Mary Fitzmaurice nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1494, nel Blarney, Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilcrea, County Cork, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerryは1415年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクでTeige MacCarthy 6th Lord of MuskerryとCatherine O'Brianの息子として生まれた。ヨーロッパでLady Mary Fitzmauriceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1494年にアイルランドコウントイ コルクコルクブラーニーで79歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ コルクキルクレアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry(은)는 1415년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크에서 Teige MacCarthy 6th Lord of Muskerry(와)과 Catherine O'Brian의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 우럽에서 Lady Mary Fitzmaurice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1494년 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 코르크 블라른이에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 킬크리아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry nasceu em 1415, em Cork, County Cork, Irlanda filho de Teige MacCarthy 6th Lord of Muskerry e Catherine O'Brian. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary Fitzmaurice em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1494, em Blarney, Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilcrea, County Cork, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry родился в 1415 г. в местности корк, коунти корк, Ирландия. Его родителей звали Teige MacCarthy 6th Lord of Muskerry и Catherine O'Brian. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Fitzmaurice в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1494 г. в местности бларни, корк, коунти корк, Ирландия в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности килкреа, коунти корк, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cormac Laidir MacCarthy 9th Lord of Muskerry nació en 1415, en Cork, County Cork, Irlanda como hijo de Teige MacCarthy 6th Lord of Muskerry y Catherine O'Brian. Se casó con Lady Mary Fitzmaurice en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1494, en Blarney, Cork, County Cork, Irlanda, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Kilcrea, County Cork, Irlanda.
